references.name: Bejamas — Neubrutalism Web Design Trend
observedPatterns: Thick black outlines on all components (buttons, cards, icons)
Raw neobrutalist shadows as rectangles beneath elements (no blur)
Flat design prioritizing function over form
Generous whitespace between objects and text
adaptedElements: 4px solid black borders on all cards, buttons, and containers
Hard drop shadows (4px 4px 0px black) with no blur or spread
Watermelon (#FF5E54) + Malachite (#2BBF5D) + Cornflower (#1283EB) + Lemon (#FFE459) + Amethyst (#7B61FF) on Creamy Milk (#F8F3EC) background
Oversized stat card numbers and aggressive hover transforms

references.name: NN/g — Neobrutalism: Definition and Best Practices
observedPatterns: 2-3 bold high-contrast colors for visual impact and accessibility
Chunky sans-serif headlines paired with clean body fonts
Generous padding (24-32px) around dense geometric shapes
adaptedElements: Space Grotesk 700 for chunky headlines, 400 for body, IBM Plex Mono for code
24-32px padding on all major cards and sections
Active states use translate(2px, 2px) with reduced shadow for press feedback
Kanban column headers use full-width solid background colors for bold contrast
Navigation drawer slams open with cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1) for heavy feel
